SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

Class FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration.FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration
@AutoConfiguration(after={FailoverAutoConfiguration.class,FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration.class}) @ConditionalOnExpression("${failover.enabled:true} eq true") @EnableConfigurationProperties(FailoverProperties.class) public class FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration extends Object
Central assembler that creates the single FailoverStore<Object> bean by combining a TenantStoreFactory (raw store) with the standard decorator chain (DefaultFailoverStore + optionally FailoverStoreAsync and/or MultiTenantFailoverStore).

Also owns all single-tenant TenantStoreFactory registrations (inmemory, caffeine, jdbc) via inner Configuration classes, keeping all store configuration in one place.

Decorator chain — four modes

Decorator chain modes
multitenant.enabledasyncChain (outermost → innermost)
false (default)true (default) FailoverStoreAsync → DefaultFailoverStore → raw
false (default)false DefaultFailoverStore → raw
truetrue (default) MultiTenantFailoverStore → (per tenant) FailoverStoreAsync → DefaultFailoverStore → raw
truefalse MultiTenantFailoverStore → (per tenant) DefaultFailoverStore → raw

MultiTenantFailoverStore is always the outermost bean in multi-tenant mode. It resolves the tenant on the calling thread before any executor boundary is crossed, then delegates to the correct per-tenant decorated store.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Constructor Details

    • FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration

      public FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration()

  • Method Details

    • failoverTaskExecutor

      @Bean("failoverTaskExecutor") @ConditionalOnBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnMissingBean(name="failoverTaskExecutor") @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store", name="async", havingValue="true", matchIfMissing=true) public org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor failoverTaskExecutor()
      Default TaskExecutor for async store operations.

      Applications can override by declaring a bean named failoverTaskExecutor. Uses virtual threads when available (JDK 21+), otherwise platform threads.

      Returns:
      virtual-thread SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor named failover-async-*

    • asyncFailoverStore

      @Bean("failoverStore") @ConditionalOnBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnMissingBean(FailoverStore.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store",name="async",havingValue="true",matchIfMissing=true) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store.multitenant",name="enabled",havingValue="false",matchIfMissing=true) public FailoverStore<Object> asyncFailoverStore(TenantStoreFactory<Object> storeFactory, @Qualifier("failoverTaskExecutor") org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor failoverTaskExecutor, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
      Async store: FailoverStoreAsync(DefaultFailoverStore(raw)). Active when failover.store.async=true (default) and multitenant disabled.
      Parameters:
      storeFactory - raw store factory
      failoverTaskExecutor - executor for async write offloading
      observablePublisher - sink for async-failure metrics
      Returns:
      assembled async store chain

    • syncFailoverStore

      @Bean("failoverStore") @ConditionalOnBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnMissingBean(FailoverStore.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store",name="async",havingValue="false") @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store.multitenant",name="enabled",havingValue="false",matchIfMissing=true) public FailoverStore<Object> syncFailoverStore(TenantStoreFactory<Object> storeFactory)
      Sync store: DefaultFailoverStore(raw). Active when failover.store.async=false and multitenant disabled.
      Parameters:
      storeFactory - raw store factory
      Returns:
      assembled sync store chain

    • asyncMultiTenantFailoverStore

      @Bean("failoverStore") @ConditionalOnBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnMissingBean(FailoverStore.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store.multitenant",name="enabled",havingValue="true") @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store",name="async",havingValue="true",matchIfMissing=true) public FailoverStore<Object> asyncMultiTenantFailoverStore(TenantResolver tenantResolver, TenantStoreFactory<Object> rawFactory, FailoverProperties props, @Qualifier("failoverTaskExecutor") org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor failoverTaskExecutor, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
      Async multi-tenant store: MultiTenantFailoverStore with per-tenant FailoverStoreAsync(DefaultFailoverStore(raw)) decorator. Active when failover.store.multitenant.enabled=true and failover.store.async=true (default).
      Parameters:
      tenantResolver - resolves the current tenant ID
      rawFactory - creates a raw store per tenant
      props - failover properties for strategy and default-tenant config
      failoverTaskExecutor - executor for async per-tenant write offloading
      observablePublisher - sink for async-failure metrics
      Returns:
      assembled multi-tenant async store

    • syncMultiTenantFailoverStore

      @Bean("failoverStore") @ConditionalOnBean(TenantStoreFactory.class) @ConditionalOnMissingBean(FailoverStore.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store.multitenant",name="enabled",havingValue="true") @ConditionalOnProperty(prefix="failover.store",name="async",havingValue="false") public FailoverStore<Object> syncMultiTenantFailoverStore(TenantResolver tenantResolver, TenantStoreFactory<Object> rawFactory, FailoverProperties props)
      Sync multi-tenant store: MultiTenantFailoverStore with per-tenant DefaultFailoverStore(raw) decorator. Active when failover.store.multitenant.enabled=true and failover.store.async=false.
      Parameters:
      tenantResolver - resolves the current tenant ID
      rawFactory - creates a raw store per tenant
      props - failover properties for strategy and default-tenant config
      Returns:
      assembled multi-tenant sync store
